zh.Airaines, Somme, Picardie, France: 法國皮卡迪索姆艾萊恩斯
zh.Dainville, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-Franc: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯達維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Pierre De Conty於1135年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆孔提時，他的父親Adrien de Conty28歲，母親Constance de Picquigny17歲。他於1159年與Anne d'Airaines在法國皮卡迪索姆艾萊恩斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1188年在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.Dainville, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-Franc: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯達維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pierre De Conty于1135年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆孔提时，他的父亲Adrien de Conty28岁，母亲Constance de Picquigny17岁。他于1159年与Anne d'Airaines在法国皮卡迪索姆艾萊恩斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1188年在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Conty
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Connachtaigh ‘descendant of Connachtach’, a name for someone from Connacht. Compare Connaughton .

variants.name: Connaughton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ciaran, Ronan.
Irish (Galway, Roscommon and Westmeath): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Connachtáin ‘descendant of Connachtan’ (see Conaty ).

nameMeanings.name: Pierre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Pierre De Conty was born in 1135, in Conty, Somme, Picardie, France, his father, Adrien de Conty, was 28 and his mother, Constance de Picquigny, was 17. He married Anne d'Airaines in 1159, in Airaines, Somme, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1188, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pierre De Conty est né en 1135, à Conty, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Adrien de Conty, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Constance de Picquigny, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Anne d'Airaines en 1159, à Airaines, Somme, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1188, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pierre De Conty 1135 in Conty, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adrien de Conty 28 und seine Mutter Constance de Picquigny 17. Er hat 1159 in Airaines, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich Anne d'Airaines geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1188 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre De Conty è nato il nel 1135 nel Conty, Somme, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Adrien de Conty, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Constance de Picquigny, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Anne d'Airaines nel 1159, nel Airaines, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1188, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Pierre De Contyが1135年にフランスピカーディソンメコントイで生まれた時，父Adrien de Contyは28歳，母Constance de Picquignyは17歳であった。1159年にフランスピカーディソンメエイレアインスでAnne d'Airainesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1188年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pierre De Conty(이)가 1135년 프랑스 피카디 솜 콘티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adrien de Conty(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de Picquigny(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1159년 프랑스 피카디 솜 어인스에서 Anne d'Airaines(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1188년 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre De Conty nasceu em 1135, em Conty, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Adrien de Conty, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Constance de Picquigny, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne d'Airaines em 1159, em Airaines, Somme, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1188, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pierre De Conty родился в 1135 г. в местности конти, сомм, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Adrien de Conty было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance de Picquigny, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne d'Airaines в 1159 г. в местности эиреаинесь, сомм, пикарди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1188 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pierre De Conty nació en 1135, en Conty, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Adrien de Conty, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Constance de Picquigny, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Anne d'Airaines en 1159, en Airaines, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1188, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
